metadata.description: Give Claude Code a semantic brain for your entire codebase. Index once, ask anything — no more pasting files into chat.

plugins.name: repomind
plugins.description: Semantic codebase search and Q&A for Claude Code. Builds a local FAISS vector index from your repo, then answers natural language questions grounded in your actual code. Works offline — no API key needed for search. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY for AI-generated answers.
